title: Verbose Error Information Disclosure
description: Returning full stack traces, SQL error messages, or internal exception details to clients leaks system architecture information useful for targeted attacks (OWASP A05:2021 / CWE-209).

finding.message: Verbose error disclosure at '{{token}}' in {{file}} at line {{line}}.

references: Log detailed errors server-side with a correlation ID; return only a generic message to clients.
Implement a global exception handler that sanitizes error responses before they reach clients.
Disable debug mode and exception propagation in production configurations.
